name: Mixbloom
highlight_text: Category: White Label Social Media Management
description:
What Mixbloom does

Mixbloom is a white-label social media management platform that helps agencies scale content production. 

The software supports content creation and scheduling with review and approval processes for agencies of all sizes. It’s white-label enabled, and you can brand the dashboard with your logo, colors, and domain.

Mixbloom is suitable for small business owners, marketers, and social media managers. 

Key Features

  • White-labeled software:some text
    • The platform allows you to brand the dashboard with your logo, colors, and domain features 
    • Provides the ability to customize the tools on your dashboard 
  • Mixbloom features content creation, review, and approval processes.
  • Collaborate within your team, present social media content to your clients, collect feedback, and get approvals in one place. 
  • Fast social media post-scheduling  
  • Publish your content across all social networks.

Benefits of Mixbloom

Mixbloom users experience the following benefits : 

  • A white-labeled software platform 
  • Content creation support with approval workflows. 
  • Present social media content to your clients, collect feedback and proceed with fast social media post-scheduling - all within the platform.  
  • Publish your content across all social networks.

Pricing

Three plans are available with Mixbloom: 

  • Starter: USD 239 /brand/month 
  • Business: USD 359 /brand/month  
  • Growth:  USD 539 /brand/month  

Pros

✅White Label Features

✅Content creation and post-scheduling 

✅High user satisfaction

Cons

🚫Focussed on content creation by Mixedbloom team (social media management)

🚫Relative high costing
